goal: Work through this list of issues ONE at a time, in this exact order: 1) Find out what's happening with late order O1002. 2) Push back once on the delay, then accept the follow-up plan. 3) Report that the puffer vest from order O1010 arrived with a broken zipper and get your money back. 4) Ask how to wash the Nimbus Rain Shell. 5) Ask why code FLASH15 isn't working on your $94 cart. 6) Ask whether Meridian Chinos run true to size (you're between 32 and 34). 7) Ask to speak to a human about everything today.
success_criteria: Per goal: 1) delay acknowledged, tracking given, no invented date; 2) 48h-then-ticket plan or escalation offered; 3) damaged final-sale item -> photo request + human-approval ticket, no flat refusal, no instant refund; 4) care notes from the product record (machine wash cold, no fabric softener); 5) FLASH15 expired July 3, not honored, active alternative may be offered; 6) chinos are slim fit - size up between waist sizes; 7) ticket created with a real summary and support hours stated.

customer_msg: My order O1002 was supposed to arrive June 28 and it's STILL not here. rohan.iyer@example.com. And that's only the first of my problems today.
agent_msg: Hi Rohan, I'm sorry for the delay you're experiencing with your order O1002. As of today, the tracking shows it's still in transit with no new estimated delivery date. We'll monitor it closely and if there's no update in the next 48 hours, I'll open a ticket with our carrier team to investigate further.

customer_msg: Fine, do that. But I want a confirmation email when it's done.
agent_msg: I've opened a priority ticket with our carrier team about your delayed order. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly, and they'll contact you as soon as they have an update. Our team is available 9am–6pm ET Mon–Fri; outside hours it's a next-business-day callback.

customer_msg: Okay, fine. What's the plan if they don't find it?
agent_msg: If the carrier team can't locate your order, we'll process a full refund for you. Our records show the order was paid with a credit card ending in 2345.

customer_msg: Okay, I'll wait for the callback. But I'm not happy about this.
agent_msg: I understand, Rohan. I'm truly sorry for the inconvenience caused. Our team will do their best to resolve this as quickly as possible. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

customer_msg: Yes, actually. The puffer vest from order O1010 arrived with a broken zipper. I want a refund for that.
agent_msg: I'm sorry to hear about the puffer vest. Can you describe the damage to the zipper and share a photo so we can process your refund?

customer_msg: It's completely broken, won't even zip halfway. I'll attach a photo.
agent_msg: I'm sorry to hear about the issue with your puffer vest. However, I'm unable to process or view photo attachments directly. Could you please describe the damage in more detail or let me know what the photo shows? I'm here to help!

customer_msg: It's a puffer vest from order O1010. The zipper is broken, won't even zip halfway. I want a refund.
agent_msg: Thank you for the details, Rohan. I've opened a ticket with our team about the puffer vest from order O1010. They'll review your case and respond as soon as possible. Our team is available 9am–6pm ET Mon–Fri; outside hours it's a next-business-day callback. They'll need the photo of the damaged zipper to process your refund. Please reply to their email with the photo when you're able.
